chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ الْمُخْتَلِعَةِ وَ الْمُبَارِئَةِ وَ نَفَقَتِهِمَا وَ سُكْنَاهُمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 64 – Waiting period of the women divorced by Al-Khul’a, and Al-Mubaraat, and their expenses, and their dwelling

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/241)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/241)

en.hubeali: And by his chain, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Abdul Kareem, from Al Halby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Do not provide for the woman divorced by Al-Khul’a’.
en.sarwar: 2. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith the following is narrated Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Abd al- Karim from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that a woman because of al-Khul‘ does not receive any benefit.’”
